name: GitHub Copilot CLI
description: Installs GitHub Copilot CLI from the official release installer

version.description: Copilot CLI version to install. Use 'latest', 'prerelease', or a specific version like '1.2.3' or 'v1.2.3'.

autoUpdate.description: Run 'copilot update' on each container start. Only useful when version is 'latest' or 'prerelease'.
